summary: Tight performance with an especially strong second set, though recording details are unclear
review: The reviewer describes a very positive experience, noting that the band sounded tight and that the second set surpassed the first in energy. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality were provided, so the technical side of the recording remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; praise focuses on performance rather than audio quality, leading to a solid but unverified rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks about sound clarity, mix balance, or source type were made in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer felt the second set was tighter and more energetic than the first, describing the overall show as a “miracle” after the first set.
